W5-N.name: W5 lettino per bambini 5-in-1
W5-N.description:
lettino per bambini with cradle
This practical and versatile 5-in-1 letto with a cradle is perfect for piccolo rooms. It has a built-in cradle (additionally paid) that gently rocks the baby "side to side". The ability to dismantle the cradle gives you the option of using a free-standing cot or a cot on ruote. Thanks to its compact dimensions, it fits through doors and makes it easy to move between rooms. Perfect for children up to 3 years old.

677.name: piccolo Basic letto materasso W2
677.description: Rucken Basic is a complete and proven materasso made of high-quality T-25 elastic foam with medium H3 hardness. It will ensure undisturletto and peaceful sleep in comfortable conditions and the healthy development of your baby from the first days of life.

732.name: piccolo Stabil letto materasso W2
732.description: Stabil is a materasso with durable and highly elastic latex in the central part, which perfectly adapts to the shape of the baby's body. We managed to enhance the unique features of latex with excellent ventilation and the possibility of naturale latex disinfection in a home freezer. All thanks to the production process, which takes place on the most modern machines.

673.name: piccolo Aseptic crib materasso W2
673.description: A materasso with excellent antibatterico and antiallergic properties. Like our other materassoes, we made it of highly elastic HR35 foam, but we did not add additional functional layers. Thanks to this, the antibatterico properties of the foam play the main role here, along with excellent and healthy support for the baby.

671.name: Aero grande Crib materasso W2
671.description:
Aero is probably the best breathable materasso on the market. The excellent ventilation of the Air Pro system used in our materassoes is additionally supported by a 3D mat added over the entire surface.

Thanks to Rucken Aero, you will create a comfortable zone with the perfect temperature between your baby's back and the materasso. The Aero materasso means definitely fewer wake-ups caused by overheating.

DRESSER-NATURAL.name: cassettiera
DRESSER-NATURAL.description:
A cassettiera with
a height-adjustable changing table
Fronts and legs made of solid beech legno.
2 deep drawers + 1 shallower drawer – perfect for 
cosmetics and diapers.
Handles can be mounted at any height and across 
the full width of the cassettiera.
Adjustable changing table – 4 height levels, 
adjustable every 5 cm (up to 20 cm).
Option to mount the changing table on the right, 
left, or in the center of the cassettiera.
Stable arched legs – harmoniously matching our cribs.
